lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: Nilsal. Do you wish me to exchange banknotes for you? I charge only 10 coins for each banknote.

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: Then hand me the banknotes you wish me to exchange.

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: I am Virilis. I can exchange banknotes of bones for real items. Do you want any banknotes converted?

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: I'm glad you've asked! Next to me is an old altar of Ralos, upon which you can ask for bones and wines to be blessed.

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: You should beware though, Ralos won't hear your prayers if you aren't experienced enough. I wouldn't want you to get caught in the cold just waiting for nothing to happen.

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: Anyway, once you've had Ralos' blessing, you can break the bones down into shards. Then, along with your blessed wine, you can take them to the libation bowl and sacrifice them in Ralos' honour!

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: Yes! You'll find it inside the Teomat, near the library.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. And what happens if I drink the blessed wine?

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: The last person to try that ended up in the libation bowl. I do not recommend it.

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: Anyway, do you want any banknotes converted?

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: I'm afraid I can only exchange bank notes for real items.

sections.title: Using a noted item other than bones

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: I only exchange bones that you can bless at Ralos' altar.

sections.title: Using a noted bones with less than 10 coins in inventory

lines.speaker: Virilis
lines.text: I require 10 coins for exchanging each banknote.

sections.title: Attempting to unnote bones with a full inventory:
